programme.desc: When a plague of bizarre, puzzling murders grip London, young Holmes and his new found friend Watson find themselves unwittingly entangled in the dark mystery.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In need of a vacation from his ordinary life, factory worker Douglas Quaid (Colin Farrell) visits Rekall, a company that can turn dreams into real memories. Thinking that memories of life as a superspy are just the ticket, Quaid undergoes the procedure -- but it goes horribly wrong. Suddenly, Quaid is a hunted man. He teams up with a rebel fighter (Jessica Biel) on a search to find the head of the underground resistance and take down the leader (Bryan Cranston) of the free world.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After an epic battle, a great city lies in ruins, but the Earth itself is saved. As humanity begins to pick up the pieces, a shadowy group emerges to try to take control of history. Meanwhile, an ancient and powerful new menace sets its sights on Earth. A new group of humans, led by Cade Yeager (Mark Wahlberg), helps Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) and the Autobots rise up to meet their most fearsome challenge yet: a worldwide war of good versus evil.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Two years after he and his Autobot friends saved the Earth from the Decepticons, Sam Witwicky (Shia LaBeouf) faces a new battle: college. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the Autobots are working with a secret military organization and trying to make a home for themselves on Earth. When an ancient Decepticon known as The Fallen rises up to wreak vengeance, Sam and his girlfriend, Mikaela, must figure out the history of the Transformers on Earth and find a way to defeat The Fallen once and for all.

programme.title: A Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: City officials evacuate the capital of Arizona once they realize an astronomer (Richard Crenna) was right about a comet.

programme.title: Nothing in Common
programme.desc: A successful advertising executive, David Basner (Tom Hanks), is working on a project that could make him partner at his company. When his parents suddenly end their 36-year marriage, he is thrown into the role of caregiver, dealing with his delicate mother, Lorraine (Eva Marie Saint), and his combative father, Max (Jackie Gleason), who provides constant aggravation and bitter remarks. When one of his parents gets sick, David must choose what is more important, his family or his career.

programme.title: The Last Dragonslayer
programme.desc: A young orphan girl (Ellise Chappell), indentured servant to a magician, discovers that she's destined to become the last dragonslayer in a world with only one remaining dragon.

programme.title: Pal Joey
programme.desc: Joey Evans (Frank Sinatra) is a philandering San Francisco-based singer with big dreams of starting his own night club, Chez Joey, but chasing women keeps him even more occupied. Despite making a meaningful connection with lovely chorus girl Linda English (Kim Novak), it doesn't stop him from seducing the wealthy widow, and ex-burlesque dancer, Vera Simpson (Rita Hayworth), who he hopes will bankroll his club. Ultimately, Joey has to decide who -- and what -- he most wants in life.

programme.title: The Bedford Incident
programme.desc: Reporter Ben Munceford (Sidney Poitier) is aboard a U.S. Navy ship sailing near the Arctic Circle, on assignment to write a profile of Capt. Eric Finlander (Richard Widmark), a hardened anti-communist. Despite the concerns of Munceford, medical officer Chester Potter (Martin Balsam) and others on the ship, Finlander is shadowing a Soviet submarine on patrol in the same area, hoping to make it to surface. The cat-and-mouse game, however, turns deadly serious.

programme.title: Our Wife
programme.desc: A composer (Melvyn Douglas) goes on a cruise and meets a woman (Ruth Hussey) he likes more than his wife (Ellen Drew).

programme.title: You Belong to Me
programme.desc: Rich playboy Peter Kirk (Henry Fonda) crashes into Dr. Helen Hunt (Barbara Stanwyck) on a ski slope and overplays his injuries so she will continue her medical attention. He declares his love, and, although Helen insists that her career will always come first, the two get married. Soon, Peter is consumed by jealous suspicions of his wife's male patients and embarrasses Helen several times. Fearful of driving her away, Peter launches into character-changing behavior to prove his love.

programme.title: Dear God
programme.desc: Special delivery for comedy fans! Greg Kinnear stars in and Garry Marshall directs this spirit-lifter about a money-scamming con artist who goes from no-good to doing good.

programme.title: Against the Ropes
programme.desc: Against the Ropes stars Meg Ryan as Kallen, a sassy, brassy boxing manager-in-the-making determined to change "Lethal" Luther Shaw from a mere street punk into a world-class prizefighter.

programme.title: Without A Paddle
programme.desc: Seth Green, Matthew Lillard and Dax Shepard star in this offbeat comedy as childhood friends whose lives have drifted apart but must reunite following the sudden death of a fourth friend.

programme.title: Orange County
programme.desc: Shaun is content to be a bright but unfocused surf slacker, until the day he discovers a novel by acclaimed author Martin Skinner. Inspired, he suddenly leaves behind Orange County to study creative writing Stanford University.

programme.title: Unleashed
programme.desc: Crime boss Bart raises orphan Danny with no knowledge of anything other than how to fight, using him as an enforcer when debts must be collected. Planning to enter Danny into a fight tournament and retire with the prize money, Bart disappears after a deadly drive-by shooting. Danny flees and takes shelter with kindly piano tuner Sam. Away from Bart's abusive control, Danny learns how to live like a human and begins investigating his past.

programme.title: Streets of Fire
programme.desc: Raven Shaddock (Willem Dafoe), along with his gang of merciless biker friends, kidnaps rock singer Ellen Aim (Diane Lane). Ellen's former lover, soldier-for-hire Tom Cody (Michael Paré), happens to be passing through town on a visit. In an attempt to save his star act, Ellen's manager, Billy Fish (Rick Moranis), hires Tom to rescue Ellen. Billy and Tom, along with former soldier McCoy (Amy Madigan), battle through dangerous cityscapes, determined to get Ellen back.

programme.title: ffolkes
programme.desc: An English admiral (James Mason) needs an eccentric lord (Roger Moore) and his frogmen to save oil rigs and a ship from a mad bomber (Anthony Perkins).

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: An ex-con takes a job truck driving across the country. However, the truck is filled with illegal weapons and now he must fight to save his family. The stakes are high as gun runners, government agents and a fleet of monstrous 18-wheelers pursue him in an intense highway duel.

programme.title: Christmas Survival
programme.desc: Sisters, Miranda (Gemma Whelan, "Game of Thrones") and Lyla (Joely Richardson) come together for Christmas in this heart-warming holiday comedy. However, ancient sibling rivalries flare-up to sabotage the hope for a season of good will.

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Hillary Burns (Somerville) is always struggling in life and love while constantly feeling the pressure to marry from her demanding mother, Meredith (Long).

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Planning for Joy
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Hazel works with trivia host Theo to promote her new subscription box.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Gamma Pi Omicron pledges retreat while Pete recovers. Sarah bonds with Jordan, and Allison gets her way.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: It's the day of the Gamma Fair, but Sarah doesn't want to go. Bundy rescues Kappa Psi Psi's bachelorette auction, but pays for it later.

programme.title: Dance Together
programme.desc: An injured dancer and a shy Deaf girl overcome bullies, disability stigma, and other high school obstacles.

programme.title: First Love
programme.desc: Left alone at the age of 17, Woo-min, enters into cruel world to protect his late father's caregiver, Su-jung.

programme.title: Awake
programme.desc: So-Jin, Dong-hyuk and Hye-Rin are complete strangers. They wake up and find themselves locked up side by side.

programme.title: Life Risking Romance
programme.desc: What would you do if the love of your life were a serial killer? A crime novel writer Han Jane has become a nuisance to her neighbors by often mistaking her neighbors as suspects of crime. One day, she hears someone's scream from upstairs and decides that the person upstairs is the serial killer on loose. While Jane keeps pursuing the serial killer with help of Jason and her childhood friend, she witnesses a shocking scene that changes everything she had believed so far.

programme.title: Kingmaker
programme.desc: Dreaming of changing the world, Seo Chang-dae takes part in Kim Woon-bum's presidential campaign.

programme.title: Surviving the Storm
programme.desc: A twenty-eight year old single mother hears the unsettling news of stage three breast cancer causing two estranged sisters to confront family secrets and stop the silence.

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: A group of kids stumble across something unfamiliar, and have no idea of the adventure that awaits them. When the games begin the eye chooses its course.

programme.title: Ebony Hustle
programme.desc: BAM baby! You busted! Ex-stripper turned private investigator, Ebony, takes on her most dangerous case yet.

programme.title: Bootleg Church
programme.desc: After a church's Bishop dies, a new senior pastor, Pastor Moore, inherits the church, it's congregation and assets. Pastor Moore begins to use the church as a cover-up for his underground drug smuggling, money-laundering, and insurance fraud schemes. Soon Pastor Moore's lies, lust, and greed begin to entangle everyone, and everything around him into his world of crime, and within that world every kept secret will be revealed, and become his downfall.

programme.title: J.W. Coop
programme.desc: After spending a decade behind bars for writing bad checks and punching a cop, former rodeo star J.W. Coop (Cliff Robertson) re-enters a world drastically different from how he left it the only constant seems to be his mother (Geraldine Page). Gradually coming to terms with societal changes and cultural norms, Coop is determined to climb back to the top spot on the rodeo circuit. Along the way, he hooks up with Bean (Cristina Ferrare), a liberated woman who helps him catch up to modern life.

programme.title: Major Dundee
programme.desc: During the end of the Civil War, Major Dundee guards Confederate prisoners, Union deserters and ordinary hard-bitten criminals in a remote fort. When Apaches attack the fort and make off with three children, Dundee must set up a posse including Confederates, who face a choice between joining up or being shot. The feud between Dundee and Tyreen is also heated up by a sultry Mexican widow.

programme.title: Return to Warbow
programme.desc: Three escaped convicts return to collect the money that the brother of one of them has already spent.

programme.title: Texas
programme.desc: Confederate soldiers Dan (William Holden) and Tod (Glenn Ford) look to Texas for opportunities when the war ends. Upon witnessing a stagecoach robbery, the close friends ambush the outlaws and confiscate the stolen funds. Tod wishes to return the money, but Dan wants to keep it. After a sheriff gives chase, each man runs off on his own. They are reunited after some time, but with Tod now an honest ranch hand and Dan an outlaw cattle rustler, the two do not know if their friendship can survive.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando's only time as a Directo, Rio (Marlon Brando) also called "The Kid", his mentor Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), & a third man called Doc, rob a bank of two saddlebags of gold in Sonora, Mexico.

programme.title: Bounty Hunter in Trinity
programme.desc: Townsfolk hire a bounty hunter to protect them from a band of Mexican outlaws.

programme.title: One Damned Day at Dawn... Django Meets Sartana!
programme.desc: A young man arrives in the small desert town of Black City to assume the vacant sheriff's position, much to the distaste of a Mexican bandit leader. Complications arise when a famous bounty hunter shows up in town.

programme.title: Against a Crooked Sky
programme.desc: When the eldest daughter of a family of settlers is captured by an American Indian warrior, her brother, Sam Sutter (Stewart Petersen), sets out to rescue her. Along the way, he encounters a wise, but alcoholic trapper named Russian (Richard Boone) who agrees to help him. The pair's journey into the remote Red Rock region of Utah is a perilous one, which ultimately brings them face to face with Chief Cut Tongue (Henry Wilcoxon), whose solution to the situation is a treacherous one.

programme.title: The Executioner of God
programme.desc: A former gunman turned priest seeks vengeance on three bandits who are masquerading as law-abiding citizens.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A con man makes his living by provoking and then betting on gunfights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble while transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a man, eerily similar to a man he killed, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Westerner
programme.desc: Accused of stealing horses, drifter Cole Harden (Gary Cooper) finds himself before the infamous Judge Roy Bean (Walter Brennan). Aware of the judge's affection for actress Lily Langtree (Lilian Bond), Cole claims to know her and thus receives a suspended sentence. Soon after, Cole falls for an attractive homesteader (Doris Davenport) whose father (Fred Stone) is indirectly killed by Bean's henchmen. Looking for revenge, Cole tracks the judge to a theater where Langtree is set to perform.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Annie's childhood sweetheart has become an outlaw, the Waco Kid.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: A clumsy fortune-hunter doubles for a notorious gunfighter.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: An outlaw (Myron Healey) poses as a marshal in an attempt to free his brother from jail. With Paul McGuire, Gail Davis.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: After being framed and serving seven years in prison, a bitter man (Harry Lauter) returns to town. With Gail Davis.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Annie, Lofty and Tagg (Gail Davis, Brad Johnson, Jimmy Hawkins) step in when a store owner is killed and his young daughter is left blind. With Judy Nugent.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Annie becomes suspicious of Elaine Forbes, the seemingly innocent niece of a recently deceased rancher.

programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy
programme.desc: Hoppy tracks a counterfeiting ring.

programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy
programme.desc: An evil ranch foreman tries to provoke a range war by playing two cattlemen against each other while helping a gang to rustle the cattle each cattleman ends up blaming the other for missing cattle.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An engineer becomes engaged to a saloon singer.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A sheriff hires a wayward youth as a deputy.

programme.desc: A posse storms outlaws hidden in a cavern.

programme.desc: An Indian chief gives a woman a terrible choice.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The former boss of an alcoholic newspaperman must turn him sober before an important guest arrives.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A woman makes a deal with an ailing Comanche.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Renegade Indians led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A frontier couple battle Indians, outlaws and a government-issued land grant to save their ranch.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A woman (Grace Lee Whitney) seeks Baja gold.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two friends play a game of cards to determine their future after leaving the army.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: An Old West poker player (Kenny Rogers) acquires a sidekick (Bruce Boxleitner) and sets out to help the son he never knew.

programme.title: Oh, Susanna
programme.desc: Wolf Benson (Boothe Howard) is a ruthless outlaw in search of a new identity. After chucking innocent cowboy Gene Autry (Gene Autry) off a train, he steals Gene's luggage and takes on his identity before continuing on a murderous and merciless crime spree. And soon it's the real Autry who is arrested. But his loyal friends Frog Millhouse (Smiley Burnette) and Professor Ezekial Daniels (Earle Hodgins) bust him out, and the three go in search of Benson to clear Autry's sullied name.

programme.title: Mexicali Rose
programme.desc: Gene Autry (Gene Autry) and his musical sidekick, Frog Millhouse (Smiley Burnette), find themselves in a pickle after Carruthers (William Royle), a new advertiser on Autry's popular radio program, swindles a slew of listeners into buying stock in a barren oil well. Determined to help recover funds intended for an orphanage run by the lovely Anita Loredo (Luana Walters), Autry, Millhouse and heroic vigilante Valdez (Noah Beery) plot to beat the heartless Carruthers at his own game.

programme.title: Home on the Prairie
programme.desc: Cattle ranchers Belknap (Walter Miller) and Selby (Gordon Hart) plot to send their cattle to market before agricultural inspector Gene Autry (Gene Autry) can confirm the presence of hoof-and-mouth disease. Learning a veterinarian is also on the way to inspect, Belknap and Selby move their infected cattle to the ranch of unsuspecting Jim Wheeler (George Cleveland) and his daughter (June Storey). Suspicious, Gene and his partner, Frog (Smiley Burnette), investigate and unearth a complex plot.

programme.title: The Big Show
programme.desc: Arrogant film star Tom Ford (Gene Autry) goes AWOL before a high-profile personal appearance at the Texas Centennial Exposition in Dallas. In a panic, publicist Lee Wilson (William Newell) instructs Ford's screen double, kindhearted cowboy Gene Autry (also Autry), to go on in Ford's place. Gangster Rico (Harry Worth), to whom Ford owes $10,000, and Ford's fiancée, Toodles (Sally Payne), complicate the deception, as does Gene's budding romance with lady rancher Marion (Kay Hughes).

programme.title: Colorado Sunset
programme.desc: Craving a respite from touring life, singing cowboy Gene Autry (Gene Autry) his sidekick, Frog (Smiley Burnette) and their band, the Texas Troubadors, purchase a dairy farm in Colorado. Settling into their new lives as dairymen, Gene and the boys discover that someone is attacking area milk trucks in a bid to drive the local dairies out of business. Teaming up against the corrupt sheriff (Buster Crabbe) and veterinarian (Robert Barrat), Gene and his men fight to save the farms.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former gunfighter becomes a doctor hoping to make up for his past.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man and his son plan to settle in North Fork.

programme.title: Freedom on the Range
programme.desc: A celebration of the frontier spirit, highlighting five of the legendary Black cowboys who helped tame the Old West today, these heroes inspire a new generation of cowboys and ranchers who keep that spirit alive and well.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.sub-title: Elijah Briant and the Wild Bunch
programme.desc: When Elijah Briant is elected sheriff, the mild-mannered druggist and former teacher tries to enforce the law without carrying a weapon he soon faces a serious challenge when the last surviving members of the Wild Bunch descend on his town.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: When an elusive bandito terrorizes early Los Angeles County, a reporter shadows the sheriff who is hunting the outlaw it will be seen if the reporter can stay objective or takes matters into his own hands when he comes face to face with the killer.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier: Bill Hamilton: The Last Mountain Man
programme.desc: Coming of age on the frontier, young Bill Hamilton joins Old Bill Williams on an adventure during the final days of the fur trade as the last mountain man, Hamilton's courage is tested when he faces a showdown with Bannock warriors.

programme.desc: Country DJ Hall of Famer, Bill Cody, looks back to 1996 the year where Brooks & Dunn take off with "My Maria," Shania Twain finds career-defining success and Leann Rimes wow's the music scene at only 13.

programme.title: The Trail Beyond
programme.desc: Fresh out of college, American Rod Drew (John Wayne) is asked to assist in the search for missing people in Canada. Accompanied by Wabi (Noah Beery Jr.), his friend from school, Drew travels north, but quickly gets into a confrontation with a gang of French Canadian outlaws. When the bandits abduct the young Felice Newsome (Verna Hillie), it becomes apparent they're responsible for the other disappearances as well. Luckily, Drew and Wabi are there, determined to find and free the captives.

programme.title: Randy Rides Alone
programme.desc: Undercover government agent Randy Bowers (John Wayne) rides into a small town, happening upon a saloon that's just been shot up. Wary of the newcomer, the sheriff (Earle Dwire) arrests Randy for the murders, but the saloon owner's niece, Sally Rogers (Alberta Vaughn), helps him escape because she knows he didn't do it. Randy then sets out to find the man behind the murders and is led to an evil mastermind named Marvin Black (George Hayes), who has been passing himself off as an innocent mute.

programme.title: The Dawn Rider
programme.desc: John Mason (John Wayne) suffers a cruel homecoming when he witnesses his father's murder as he rides into town. Incensed, he chases after the killers, but he suffers a gunshot wound that cuts his pursuit short. Alice Gordon (Marion Burns) sees to his injury, and Mason is taken by her kindness and beauty. But things turn sour when her beau, Ben (Reed Howes), becomes jealous. After Mason discovers the men who killed his father, his plan for a duel is sabotaged by Ben, who has been manipulated.

The congenial mayor, Rocky (Lew Kelly), convinces John to compete in a horse race against Drake (Douglas Cosgrove), the man who sold them the bum deal, for a coveted government contract in postal delivery.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: From hearty inland crops to fresh food of the sea, the Venetian region covers it all an antipasto of succulent soft shell crab is paired with a tangy aioli made from sundried tomatoes, creating the perfect combination of crispy and creamy.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: How about upping your grill game with steaks you may not be familiar with, such as secreto or spinalis dorsi? Secreto is a hyper-flavorful steak cut from a hog's belly with a grilled vegetable sauce, romesco. Spinalis dorsi the most delectable part of a rib roast reborn as a steak, and grilled with bourbon. And grill a brisket steak fragrant with sizzling shallot sage butter.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Looking back to when our ancestors grilled in the fireplace, on stones around the campfire and directly on the embers, Primal Grilling will make you a barbecue rock star. Try ember-grilled bread roasted vegetable salad, chicken hanging in midair over a smoky fire, and amaretti-stuffed pears grilled on primordial slabs of salt, grilling techniques as old as humankind itself.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In today's show, Texas barbecue meets Mexican spice as we explore how American barbecue techniques can enhance three classic Mexican dishes: snapper in pipian in a grilled vegetable and pumpkin seed sauce, pork shoulder pibil smoke-roasted in banana leaves, and a Project Fire first, a dessert quesadilla lavished with bananas and dulce de leche.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Most barbecue enthusiasts can name the big three of barbecue: Kansas City ribs, Carolina pulled pork, and Texas smoked brisket. But what about some of the lesser-known styles? Cornell chicken was created by a Cornell University poultry scientist and today served in upstate New York. Up in Anchorage, Alaska, we have sweet yet smokey barbecued salmon.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Everyone knows that a good barbecue makes the perfect prelude to the game. In this show, we explore how my home state of Florida reimagines three tailgate classics. Get ready for pork shooters stuffed with shrimp, cheese and sausage, wings blasted with fire water, and smoky hamburgers like you've never experienced. The secret? Lace them with chopped barbecued brisket.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The pork shoulder, aka Boston butt, gives us Carolina pulled pork. The majestic beef shoulder (yes, there is such a cut) becomes a Texas barbecued beef clod. As for lamb shoulder, Moroccans cook it in a fire-heated underground clay oven to make their legendary mechoui. This show explores the richest, meatiest, most flavorful cut you find in the meat department: the shoulder.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Chino-Latino originated with Chinese laborers who immigrated to Cuba, Trinidad, and elsewhere in the Caribbean to work the plantations. They developed a unique mashup of Asian and West Indian cooking—the subject of today's show. Get ready for tangerine teriyaki chicken, butter rum grilled plantains, smoky baby back ribs with guava barbecue sauce, and Korean brisket tacos.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In Miami, our food culture is firmly anchored in Latin America and the West Indies. Our Miami Spice menu begins with a Project Fire first: the grilled mojito cocktail. Next comes Florida lobster grilled with rum butter baste and mango salsa, then plate-burying island spice beef plate ribs. Our grand finale? Turkey adobo with garlicky mojo de ajo.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. It offers an irrefutable argument for simplicity, but it can also be the perfect foil for all the rubs, marinades, butters, and sauces you can throw at it. It's easy to grill, but takes a lifetime to perfect. Let's take a look back on how steak has evolved through three iconic TV series: Primal Grill, Project Smoke, and Project Fire.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue Health Food: A little-known fact-Steven Raichlen's first James Beard Award-winning book wasn't about barbecue, but a book on healthy eating. This show harnesses the flavor- boosting, fat-melting power of live fire to produce grilled fare that not only tastes good but is good for you. From the paellas of Spain to the grilled beef salads of Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. Few other words in the English language have such power to make our hearts beat faster and our mouths water than sizzling slabs of beef seared over live fire. In this show we embark on some meaty globe hopping, exploring over-the-top steaks from France, Cambodia, and the American Southwest. Hot fire. Sizzling meat. It's a carnivore's dream come true.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Let Texans brag about brisket and Carolinians praise pulled pork shoulder. For the rest of us, the ultimate symbol of barbecue is ribs. In the American Midwest, ribs mean baby backs or other pork ribs, while in Korea, the bone of choice is the beef short rib. In the eastern Mediterranean, lamb ribs reign supreme. In this show we give you three of the best ribs ever.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Killer Barbecue – Hold the Meat You don't need a degree in barbecue to know that vegetables have hit the grill big time. Veggies for hardcore carnivores who crave killer accompaniments to their meats, for health-conscious grillers, and for everyone who delights in the smokiness and supernatural sweetness live fire imparts to plant and dairy foods.

programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern takes a spin on Nashville-style hot fried chicken. Hot and spicy, batter coated, crispy fried pheasant is paired with a spinach salad topped with bacon vinaigrette and ice cold mint basil lemonade.

programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern starts simmering a classic Italian Bolognese sauce, with ground bison, lots of red wine and tomatoes. Then, he adds marinated bison skirt steak tacos with borracho beans to the tailgate menu.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Red Curry Braised Pork with Mustard Greens

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Creamy Chicken Pot Pie and Chocolate Tiramisu
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisù.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken traybake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.title: Forking Delicious: 100 Iconic Dishes: Let's Start From the Top!
programme.desc: We're kicking things off with the 90s not the decade, but the meals!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke visits the port city of Kochi, Kerala, where he checks out the iconic Chinese fishing nets, does laundry the old-fashioned way and cooks a famous dish. He leaves the city to witness the state's backwaters and local fishing techniques.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.sub-title: Hunting for Ancient Spices in Thekkady
programme.desc: Luke visits the lush plantations of spices in Thekkady and then tours Madurai, the spiritual heart of Tamil Nadu, to find hidden gems with the help of a local food journalist.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.sub-title: The Outrageous Street Food of Pondicherry
programme.desc: Luke uncovers the history of Chettinad and savours its famous cuisine. He then tastes the chutneys in Kumbakonam and explores the exciting food scene in Pondicherry.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke visits Chennai, the capital of Tamil Nadu, a bustling city with historic ancient temples, and a vibrant modern art scene.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia: Saigon Noodles for Breakfast
programme.desc: Luke arrives in Saigon for a breakfast of iced coffee with condensed milk and a vermicelli noodle dish. Later, he visits his favourite Pho restaurant, then cooks up some spicy Chilli Crab Claws.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's penultimate stop on his train journey is Hanoi. Follow Luke on his hunt for an iconic Hanoi dish, Bun Cha. Luke takes a ride on the Reunification Express railway, and visits the famous Hoan Kiem Lake for some delcious magenta sticky rice.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Nearing the end of his Vitenamese journey, Luke stops in Sapa, a hilltop region that he remembers from his travels fifteen years ago. Join Luke as he rekindles a friendship from his previous visit and learns about a local dish of dried buffalo.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat: Perfecting Puff Pastry in Burgundy, France
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Michael Caines takes Fred to Burgundy to amazing places to eat serving the finest French country cooking and exquisite patisserie.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean: Traditional Greek Cuisine
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: The Axis deer populations in Hawaii have reached plague proportions and they are in-fact invasive to this beautifully pristine archipelago of the pacific. Luckily for Mario these deer also happen to boast the best tasting venison that the wild can produce. He teams up with big wave surfer Shane Dorian who is also a huge advocate for harvesting food from the wild. The two go out and face some of the toughest conditions as the deer swarm the mountain tops of Hawaii in huge numbers making it almost impossible to approach. In the end its all worth it as Mario and Shane have some fun on the grill all whilst doing their part in helping to lessen the population of this invasive species.

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.sub-title: Stomping Grounds - "Florida' Highway on the Water
programme.desc: From country music star Brian Kelley's big 56' Sunny Briggs Sportfishing Yacht, to getting caught in a storm aboard a small Hurricane deck boat in the Gulf of Mexico, this episode of Stomping Grounds has host Ryan McVinney exploring boat culture in Florida's Panhandle region, from the Emerald Coast to The Big Bend and the Forgotten Coast. Brian Kelley, aka “Beach Cowboy”, or BK for short, makes up one half of the country music group Florida Georgia Line (FGL) and has just released his own solo album Sunshine State of Mind. Kelley invites viewers aboard his vessel the “Brittney Marie” which was named after his wife, for a look at the couple's Stomping Grounds. Songs from his album play on the boat's sound system - including a tune about shopping for a boat on Boat Trader

programme.title: FinQuest
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of FinQuest, Ryan Miller dives into the vibrant world of offshore fishing off the coast of Palm Beach County. Joined by Cabo Mike, they showcase expert bait techniques and strategies, reeling in a variety of catches, including bonita and a stunning mahi mahi. The duo shares insights into their fishing setup, explains the use of daisy chains, and celebrates their exciting day at sea. With breathtaking views of the ocean and a colorful array of fish, Ryan's passion for saltwater fishing shines through. The episode wraps up with a reflection on the beauty and bounty of Palm Beach County waters.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When a man (Christopher Lloyd) claiming to be Fester, the missing brother of Gomez Addams (Raul Julia), arrives at the Addams' home, the family is thrilled. However, Morticia (Anjelica Huston) begins to suspect the man is a fraud, since he cannot recall details of Fester's life. With the help of lawyer Tully Alford (Dan Hedaya), Fester manages to get the Addams clan evicted from their home. Gomez realizes the two men are conspiring to swindle the Addams fortune and that he must challenge Fester.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: The members of the odd Addams Family are up to more macabre antics in this sequel. This time around, Gomez Addams (Raul Julia) and his wife, Morticia (Anjelica Huston), are celebrating the arrival of a baby boy. But siblings Wednesday (Christina Ricci) and Pugsley (Jimmy Workman) are none too happy about the new addition, and try their best to eliminate the infant. When nanny Debbie Jelinsky (Joan Cusack) appears to keep the kids in line, her presence leads to an unexpected treacherous twist.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong Still Smokin'
programme.desc: Stoners Cheech (Cheech Marin) and Chong (Thomas Chong) reunite and head to Amsterdam for a film festival after getting tickets from a promoter (Hans Man in 't Veld) in L.A. When they show up at a celebrity party, Cheech is mistaken for Burt Reynolds, and Chong for Dolly Parton. The duo rolls with it as they roll more joints, partake in the usual antics and eat every item -- which includes a lot of mushrooms -- on the menu at Amsterdam's Bvlgar Café.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: An unemployed pot-smoking slacker and amateur drummer, Anthony Stoner (Tommy Chong) ditches his strict parents and hits the road, eventually meeting kindred spirit Pedro de Pacas (Cheech Marin). While the drug-ingesting duo is soon arrested for possession of marijuana, Anthony and Pedro get released on a technicality, allowing them to continue their many misadventures and ultimately compete in a rock band contest, where they perform the raucous tune "Earache My Eye."

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians, former showgirl Rachel Phelps (Margaret Whitton), has a sweetheart deal to move the team to Miami. But to break the lease with the city of Cleveland, ticket sales have to plummet. So Phelps hires the most incompetent players available, including near-blind pitcher Rick Vaughn (Charlie Sheen) and injury-prone catcher Jake Taylor (Tom Berenger). But her villainous tactics accidentally foster a can-do team spirit, turning the Indians into potential winners.

programme.title: Bengt Washburn
programme.desc: Bengt Washburn is an Aquarius with Hazel eyes who prefers boxer briefs, solid deodorants, and Crest toothpaste. He is 5'9? tall, weighs about 149 pounds and can bench 150 pounds three times without a spotter. He has a vertical leap of 16 inches. 8 years ago a lump appeared on his right thigh. It's not visible from the stage but according to some kids at the water park, it looks creepy. Many people say Bengt looks kind of like a monkey. Bengt Washburn was born in Salt Lake City, Utah but grew up in a large Utah town (1,200 people) as the fifth child in a small Mormon family (7 children). Bengt is married to an officer in the United States Airforce. They have lived in 6 different cities over the last eleven years. Most recently he moved to Springfield, Virginia (Washington D.C.) after living in Stuttgart, Germany for 3 years. Bengt is a former winner of the prestigious San Francisco International Comedy Competition. He has been seen on The Late Late Show with Craig Fergusen, Live at Gotham on Comedy Central and most recently Conan on TBS. He was invited to perform at the Vancouver International Comedy Festival, The Boston Comedy Festival, the Aspen Laff Festival and Gilda's Laugh Fest in Grand Rapids, Michigan. He's been heard on NPR, PRI and Bob and Tom. All three of his comedy Cd's can be heard playing on XM Sirius radio. Most people who know him would say Bengt is a logistically impaired ditz, but his comedy is described as intelligent, surprisingly universal considering the content matter and profoundly funny.

programme.title: Andrew Sleighter
programme.desc: Andrew Sleighter started in comedy looking for the perfect funny line to open a biography. Since then, Andrewís laid-back style and clever writing has won him appreciation from fans and respect from his peers. A regular at colleges and comedy clubs across the country, Andrewís also performed at some of the most prestigious comedy festivals in and out of the country including Bumbershoot, Bridgetown, The Cabo Comedy Festival, The Aspen Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull, and the Johnny Carson Great American Comedy Festival. Andrew wrote and blogged for the Sports Show with Norm Macdonald on Comedy Central and was a regular on the MTV prank show Money From Strangers. Heís performed on Nuvo TVís Stand Up & Deliver, Last Comic Standing, and made his late-night stand-up debut on Conan. Andrewís comedy has the ability to reach wide ranges of audiences and works in a diversity of rooms. Reliable and consistent, he rarely ends a show by lighting the stage on fire out of rage. Most importantly, heís constantly fascinated by and eager to keep learning about stand-up.

programme.title: Lucas Bohn
programme.desc: LUCAS BOHN is energetic with an edge. The perfect blend of schoolboy charm and bad-boy charisma, his comedy is both smart and audacious. Known as the little guy who generates big laughs, Lucas has shared the stage with Dave Chappelle, Jimmy Fallon, and Kevin Hart. Lucas' high-energy shows and hilarious impersonations make him an instant hit with audiences of all ages. In 2013 Lucas was nominated "Comedian of the Year" by Campus Activities Magazine.

programme.title: Chelle T
programme.desc: As a mother of seven, Chelle T has seen it all, and shes not afraid to joke about it. Quippy and honest, Chelle T talks about how children are raised differently these days, menopause, being married for twenty-three years, and how desperate you sometimes become when youre a mom in this special.

programme.title: Nikki Carr: I Wish These Were Jokes.
programme.desc: Nikki Carr is 57 and feeling great. After all, she's got the career where all you have to do is be yourself and have a good time . . . two things she subsequently gave up for her goal weight.

programme.title: Joe Devito
programme.desc: Joe DeVito's dead-on timing and unexpected twists make him a favorite at comedy clubs across the USA. His TV appearances include The Late Late Show, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central, Comics Unleashed, and AXStv's Gotham Comedy Live. He's also a regular on TV news panels, finding the funny in pop culture and current events. Joe's albums First Date with Joe DeVito and Three's Comedy are in regular rotation on SiriusXM radio.

programme.title: Andy Woodhull
programme.desc: Andy recently appeared on Conan on TBS. Around that same time, his half-hour special premiered on Comedy Central. He was the first comedian to make his network television debut on “The Tonight Show starring Jimmy Fallon”. He also appeared on Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen, and Gotham Comedy Live on AXS. He had also appeared on Comedy Central's “Live at Gotham” in 2009.

The contestant, known as the One, competes with a mob of 100 other players by answering questions. When the One answers correctly, each member of the mob that answered incorrectly is eliminated. The One earns money for each mob member who is eliminated. If the One can eliminate the entire mob, he wins $50,000. programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: When her twin sister disappears in Japan, a young American named Sara (Natalie Dormer) becomes determined to find out what happened to her. Sara's investigation leads her to the legendary Aokigahara Forest, located at the base of Mount Fuji. Accompanied by expatriate Aiden, she enters the mysterious wilderness after being warned to "stay on the path." Her investigation plunges her into a dark world where the angry and tormented souls of the dead prey on those who dare to explore the forest.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: After decades of living on the run, murder suspect Frank O'Neal (Billy Burke) returns to Los Angeles hoping to put his derailed existence back on track. O'Neal reconnects with an old flame, Karen Mellor (Sherry Stringfield), and finds gainful employment as a driver for an armored truck service. But, as he falls under the influence of a maniacal televangelist (Gregory Itzin), the unsavory impulses behind O'Neal's return begin to surface, threatening to destroy him.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu
programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Java
programme.desc: The most notorious volcanic explosion in history came from the small island of Krakatoa, off the coast of Java, The tiny island was pulverized and the giant explosion was felt half way around the world. Java is at the heart of the Ring of Fire, and so has seen many volcanoes, mud slides and earthquakes through its long history.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Possibly the home of the deadly Marberg Ebola virus, Kitum Cave is high on Mt.Elgon straddling the Kenya-Uganda border. The deep, waterfall-shrouded cave has been carved out over millennia by elephants in search of salt. When host george kourounis gets bitten by one of the bats&mldr well, you'll have to see the show to find out what happens.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Costa Rica
programme.desc: Costa Rica is a tiny country jammed with diversity and adventure. George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down whitewater rivers in full flood, canyoneers down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Under Pressure
programme.desc: It's dark, it's cold, there is no air to breath and everything is under extreme pressure. George begins his exploration of the deep with a well-preserved shipwreck in the st.lawrence River, then heads west to dive with undersea explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuyyton, and investigate the newly discovered “Black Smoker” deepsea vents. The show climaxes in Curacao, where we dive to 1000 feet aboard Nuyyton's newest submersible.

programme.title: Angry Planet | 2009 Hurricane
programme.desc: The “Angry Planet” team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a jumping dance before stopping to watch Yvette wash up her plastic cups and saucers. The Teletubbies have a very messy day. So Noo-Noo has to tidy everything up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep, but Noo-Noo tidies up their blankets. They stop chasing him to watch some children learn about the number five. A flashing light appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Animal Show With Stinky And Jake
programme.desc: Stinky and Jake welcome an Iguana and a Roadrunner to the show. Both of these animals are really fast.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev offers to help look after a rambunctious puppy, Rumble gets jealous of all the attention he gets. And much to his annoyance, while Rev and Avery try everything to teach the pup new tricks (with no success), it only has eyes for Rumble! // When Rev tries to teach Rumble to swim with his special inflated tires, Rumble keeps sinking to the bottom of the pond. Ben and Molly suggest they get advice from Gilly, the old Fender Bend ferry pilot.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: When a game of Bumper Ball gets a little too heated, the friends start competing against their own teammates! But when a stray ball knocks open the sheep pen, they'll have to learn to work together to round up the sheep...and get back to the game! // Rev and his friends receive a map in pieces, so they race up separate mountain trails, vying to be first to claim the treasure at the top. But when there's no treasure in sight at the end, Rev's parents have some advice for finding the real reward.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. But when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev and Avery find a stray kitten, they put posters around to alert its owner. The owner arrives at the Gear Up Garage...just as the kitty vanishes! Rev and the gang set out to find the kitten, and Operation Kitten Care becomes Operation Rescue! // When Rev leads the gang in a fossil hunting expedition, they find an enormous skull! But when Molly breaks the news that they'll have to leave the skeleton for professionals to dig up, Rev wonders how he can still have a dinosaur of his own.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: A Gift for Molly // Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: It's Mudder's Day-everyone's favourite day of the year! The Stunt Park is filled with mud, and the whole town gets to drive through it. But Rev can't join them until he gets a gift for his Mom...and the stores are all closed for the festivities! // After Bo shows off his action-hero moves, Rev wants him to star in his film. Bu Bo freezes with stage fright as soon as Rev turns the camera on! Bo wants to be brave and come through for his friends, but how can he overcome his fear?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Stuckey the garbage truck dreams of entering the Auto Show, so Rev and the gang clean him up for his big debut. But after saving his friends from danger, Stuckey winds up covered in mud all over again...just in time for his moment in the spotlight! // When Lori only receives two tickets to a movie premiere, her friends compete to see which one of them is her "best friend." But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Driving Miss Dottie // Follow the Bouncing Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: When Miss Dottie goes missing, Rev and Avery offer to return her to the Rancher's Jamboree! Rumble is star-struck by the show-sheep, until the unlikely duo become friends. Back safe, Miss Dottie takes the stage, this time with her new pal Rumble! // Rev is determined to master Rumble's new wrecking-ball attachment, but things quickly get out of hand when the duo refuse to ask for help. Now they'll need all the help they can get to stop the wayward ball from wrecking all of Fender Bend!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Pond Pirates // The Coolest Girl I Know
programme.desc: When Rev's dad tells about him about treasure sunken in the pond, Rev and Avery set out on a pirate adventure! They outfit Rumble and Alley with new dive equipment to salvage the long-lost toys and cherished memories found within the chest. // When Rev's cousin Katie comes to visit, Avery's jealousy gets the best of her-Avery always thought she was the coolest girl Rev knew! Intent on outdoing Katie, Avery pulls a stunt that she comes to regret.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and the gang are painting a mural for Four-Wheeled Friendship Day! But with Avery in charge, the friends start to lose confidence in their work. She may be a master when it comes to art, but Avery has a lot to learn about being project leader! // When the pals befriend a mouse in the barn, Rumble can't resist breaking the rules by bringing the little guy a snack. Before long there are mice everywhere! Rev and Rumble will need to shoo away their tiny guests, before Mom and Dad find them!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Lily's Lovely Song
programme.desc: Lily and Tim create beautiful clay worlds inspired by English nursery rhymes. Sing along to lovable tunes in each episode.

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Kongsuni and Friends
programme.desc: For five-year-old Kongsuni life is one big adventure.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met
programme.desc: Everyday Henry meets something new - The day Henry met a Whale! The day Henry met the Moon!, The day Henry met a Car! How exciting, I wonder what Henry's going to meet today?

programme.title: Cocobi Sing-Alongs Toys
programme.desc: Sing along to popular kid's songs with Cocobi toys!

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Ted the Train - Let's harvest the colourful veggies!: It's harvest time! Let's help Ted gather as many delicious, healthy, and colourful veggies as we can find in the allotment!

programme.title: Soothing Melodies
programme.desc: A journey of Soothing Melodies like Hush Little Baby, nurturing relaxation and sleep.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Let the babies drift off into a magical slumber with Hush Little Baby, Hey Diddle Diddle and more!

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Introduce kids to a musical journey to slumber with Are You Sleeping, Hush Little Baby and more!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Relaxing melodies to help children wind down and drift off to sleep peacefully.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: A satisfying compilation of underwater art like Submarine and Seahorse along with a dreamy touch of a Shooting Star and many more.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing's this episode features satisfying artworks like Glitter Fish and Shooting Star.

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: The best of the fun nursery rhymes are here. Five Little Monkeys Song, Ten in the bed & more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Let's charm the little ones with our peppy Teacher song, The Shark Song, Mr Sun and many more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Fill the day with music and fun with Ice-cream Song, Clap Your Hands, Johny Johny Yes Papa and more!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Every kids loves Head Shoulders Knees and Toes, Old MacDonlad had a Farm & all the nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - Chimp in the Wild / Shake It: The Rangers see if their chimp friend Ernest is ready to go back to the wild. / After a terrible earthquake, the Rangers must save a group of ducks.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - Gold in That Thar Moon: Preston's gold mining mission on the moon is endangering gorillas here on Earth. The Rangers must stop him! / The Rangers must save Floof after Preston captures him.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Super Ks Save Christmas, Part 2: The Super K's must stop Nigel Danforth and his Fearsome Foursome from cancelling Christmas forever.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Lost In A Space Odyssey Trek: A trip to the Greenville Science Museum leads to an out of this world adventure.

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Hypno Pigs, Eggs' Day Out & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Hypno Pigs", "Eggs' Day Out" and more!

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Pig Plot Potion & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Pig Plot Potion", "Tooth Royal" and more!

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - Jungle Sharks: Three Dino Vengers fall ill with a deadly virus. The Sharks must retrieve a cure from the Amazon Rainforest before time runs out.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - Trojan Sharks: The Raptors plant a tracker on Stegz and capture the Dino Vengers, planning to launch them into space. The Sharks must rescue them.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Super Gronk / Bates Bumpy Day: Gronk decides that he wants to be a superhero, just like Shaq was in a movie the Paq watched. While patrolling the city, Gronk accidently causes more problems than he solves. When Keeter tries to ruin a parade that Shaq is participating in, Gronk must step in to save the day. / When a Pablo wins the chance at a day with a member of the Shaq Paq, Bates steps up to give him a day of fun. After showing Pablo some of his own favorite things, Bates has to step out of his comfort zone in order to ensure the winner has a good day.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Runaway Train / New Friends: While Dr. Grease is inspecting an old steam locomotive, it takes off by itself down the track. Biggie D, Boone, Fleming, and Himari have to band together in order to overcome obstacles to get ahead of the runaway train and bring it to a stop. / New members Curl, Gonzales, and Layla get introduced and the Paq befriend them. While Bates, Himari, and Klaus are spending time with the new members, they find it difficult to relate to the new cars. The Paq must put aside their differences and work together in order to save Shaq from danger.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Pilot / The Contest: The Shaq Paq is a group of sentient cars, led by Shaquille O'Neal, that helps out around the city of Orlanta. When a mother loses control of her baby stroller the Paq must band together to keep the baby from harm and return them to their mother. / Shaq enters Biggie D into a truck pull contest. The rest of the Shaq Paq helps him train but shockingly, Biggie D is defeated by another truck! That's when Dawkins realizes something doesn't quite add up. Shaq and the Paq band together to set things straight and learn an important lesson about fair play..

programme.desc: As the Eye of Confusion's power threatens to unravel reality, Logan and Astrid are forced to confront their deepest fears in the Dream Forge.

programme.title: Music “Battle of the Stars”
programme.desc: Nova pulls off a series of pranks, leaving her friends scrambling and laughing. However, things take a dark turn when one of her pranks goes awry and sends the group into a terrifying situation.

programme.title: The Royal Blacksmiths
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: Marvel Superheroes
programme.desc: Loki arrives at Avengers Tower declaring he wants to be an Avenger. Our heroes are skeptical, but Iron Man decides to make Loki an ”Avenger In Training”. It's a great plan until Thanos arrives on Earth looking for Loki

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: Gorilla's Gone Wild
programme.desc: Cragger angers the Gorilla tribe and they march to the Crocodile Swamp to teach him a lesson. But the Gorilla Mechs are not fit for the swampy water and the Lions and Eagles must come to the rescue. The only problem is that the Lions don't like water ... at all!

programme.title: The Haunted and the Hunted!
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible - but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Friends Reunite
programme.desc: Olly about how his obsession is affecting their relationships. Olly refuses to see the damage he's causing, but it becomes clear that he's lost touch with what really matters.

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps
